name: property managers handling 5–15 service requests/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 service requests/month, inefficient scheduling causes delayed maintenance. We provide a facilities maintenance scheduler instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or emails.
problem_solved: Inefficient scheduling of maintenance requests leads to delayed service.
